product.name: Used underwear
product.description: A little bit used underwear. A great addition to may peoples collection.

product.name: New underwear
product.description: New, unused underwear. Ewww... Who would want that when you can have used underwear.

product.name: Michal Kirk
product.description: We are Michal Kirk! We carry the flame! We'll fight for the goonbell.
